title: 250 years of American independence: Trump praises US and attacks 'communists' at chaotic celebration

title: Peruvian and Colombian presidential elections: Expatriate vote helps far right clinch victory
subhead: Peruvians living abroad helped Keiko Fujimori to win the presidency, even though only a minority of Peru's residents voted for her. Expatriate Colombians also massively backed Abelardo de la Espriella, though this was not as decisive.
